description: An EventBridge Replay replays archived events from an archive to an event bus.

ReplayName.markdownDescription:
The name of the replay.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[\.\-_A-Za-z0-9]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

ReplayArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the replay.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1600  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

EventSourceArn.description: The ARN of the archive to replay events from.
EventSourceArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the archive to replay events from.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1600  
Update requires: Replacement

EventStartTime.description: A time stamp for the time to start replaying events.
EventStartTime.markdownDescription:
A time stamp for the time to start replaying events.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

EventEndTime.description: A time stamp for the time to stop replaying events.
EventEndTime.markdownDescription:
A time stamp for the time to stop replaying events.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: Replacement

Destination.description: A ReplayDestination object that includes details about the destination for the replay.

Arn.description: The ARN of the event bus to replay events to.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the event bus to replay events to.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 1600  
Update requires: No interruption

Destination.markdownDescription:
A ReplayDestination object that includes details about the destination for the replay.

---

Required: Yes  
Update requires: Replacement

State.description: The current state of the replay.
State.markdownDescription:
The current state of the replay.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: STARTING | RUNNING | CANCELLING | COMPLETED | CANCELLED | FAILED  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ReplayStartTime.description: A time stamp for the time that the replay started.
ReplayStartTime.markdownDescription:
A time stamp for the time that the replay started.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes
